changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.sql:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ad CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE ad ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id BIGINT NOT NULL, external_id VARCHAR(64), name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, platform VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, ad_account_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, ad_set_external_id VARCHAR(64), ad_set_id BIGINT, ad_set_name VARCHAR(255), creative_id VARCHAR(64), created_at TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT fk_ad_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id), CONSTRAINT fk_ad_adset FOREIGN KEY (ad_set_id) REFERENCES ad_set(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT uq_ad_user_platform_account_ext UNIQUE (user_id, platform, ad_account_id, external_id) );

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ad CASCADE;
